package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_collection_iteration_range_over_map_for_deterministic_first: Layer: Collection iteration. Flag map iteration used to pick a deterministic first value, causing unstable work and extra sorting later.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule518NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario518Negative(records []Rule518NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
